channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Campaign text messages before midterms may come from AI bots
item.description: Trained to mimic candidates, bots are sending personalized texts, making AI-generated conversations a new campaign tool.

item.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham dies after brief illness, office confirms
item.description: The South Carolina Republican, known for advocating a strong U.S. foreign policy, died Saturday at age 71.

item.title: Could fish help rice farmers prevent disease and increase profits?
item.description: Senegalese farmers are introducing fish into rice paddies to fertilize crops, provide food, and control snail populations.

item.title: Artist's 'I.C.E. pops' exhibit on Texas campus removed within days
item.description: Trump administration orders lead campus officials to reconsider what art is allowed.
